habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Ink Cloud (Ex) An octopus can emit a 10-foot-radius sphere of ink once per minute as a free action. The ink provides total concealment in water, and persists for 1 minute. Jet (Ex) An octopus can jet backward once per round as a full-round action, at a speed of 200 feet. It must move in a straight line while jetting, and does not provoke attacks of opportunity when it does so. Poison (Ex) Bite-injury; save Fort DC 13; frequency 1/round for 6 rounds; effect 1 Str; cure 1 save.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Ink Cloud (Ex) An octopus can emit a 10-foot-radius sphere of ink once per minute as a free action. The ink provides total concealment in water, and persists for 1 minute. Jet (Ex) An octopus can jet backward once per round as a full-round action, at a speed of 200 feet. It must move in a straight line while jetting, and does not provoke attacks of opportunity when it does so. Poison (Ex) Bite-injury; save Fort DC 13; frequency 1/round for 6 rounds; effect 1 Str; cure 1 save.

fullStatBlock:
CR 1
Octopus
N Small animal aquatic
Init +3
Senses low-light vision; Perception +1
AC 15, touch 14, flat-footed 12 (+3 Dex, +1 natural, +1 size)
hp 13 (2d8+4)
Fort +5, Ref +6, Will +1
Speed 20 ft., swim 30 ft., jet 200 ft.
Melee bite +5 (1d3+1 plus poison), tentacles +3 (grab)
Space 5 ft.; Reach 5 ft.
Special Abilities Ink Cloud (Ex) An octopus can emit a 10-foot-radius sphere of ink once per minute as a free action. The ink provides total concealment in water, and persists for 1 minute. Jet (Ex) An octopus can jet backward once per round as a full-round action, at a speed of 200 feet. It must move in a straight line while jetting, and does not provoke attacks of opportunity when it does so. Poison (Ex) Bite-injury; save Fort DC 13; frequency 1/round for 6 rounds; effect 1 Str; cure 1 save.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 12, Dex 17, Con 14, Int 2, Wis 13, Cha 3
Base Atk +1; CMB +1; CMD 14
Feats MultiattackB, Weapon Finesse
Skills Escape Artist +13, Stealth +20, Swim +9
Racial Modifiers +8 Stealth, +10 Escape Artist
Environment  temperate or cold ocean
Organization solitary
Treasure none
Defensive Abilities ink cloud
Source PFRPG Bestiary
Description The octopus is a cunning animal capable of using complex tactics to get food. Octopus Companions Starting Statistics: Size Small; AC +1 natural; Speed 20 ft., swim 30 ft., jet 200 ft.; Attack bite (1d3), tentacles (grab); Ability Scores Str 12, Dex 17, Con 14, Int 2, Wis 12, Cha 3; Special Qualities low-light vision, ink cloud. 4th-Level Advancement: Attack bite (1d3 plus poison); Ability Scores Str +2, Con +2.
